title: ZUGU iPad Pro 12.9 Case 2022/2021 6th & 5th Generation - Ultra Slim Protective Cover - Wireless Apple Pencil Charging - Convenient 10-angle Magnetic Stand & Auto Sleep/Wake [ Black ]
features: NOT CHEAP... BUT WORTH EVERY PENNY!” - ​You’ve already invested in an Expensive New iPad Pro, why settle for anything less than the best (and most protective) case? The result of years of hard work & innovation, your ALPHA Case is the unrivaled leader in the iPad case game. The slim design is deceptively thin, attractive, highly protective... But don’t take our word for it, see the positive feedback from happy ZUGU owners! As of 23//4/23 over 1 Million units of ZUGU case for iPad have been sold on Amazon US ;)

HAVE THE APPLE PENCIL? GOOD... WE’VE GOT YOU COVERED! - Designed with the Apple Pencil in mind, the recessed holder on the spine is the perfect spot to store your Apple Pencil as it charges. The ZUGU 12.9 inch case also features an additional slot to store your pencil when you don’t need a charge. (*Apple Pencil not included)

WE DROPPED IT FROM 5 FEET (LOTS)... SO YOU DON’T HAVE TO! - Slim Design, Total Protection. Our industry leading rugged ​dual injection Pc/tpu shell ​has been tested, and tested... and tested to ensure your new iPad is protected from all drops of up to 5 feet, even on concrete!

FINALLY, A FUNCTIONAL CASE THAT ISN’T UGLY - Have you noticed how many ugly (and cheap) iPad Cases there are on the market?... Us too! That’s why we’ve built your new ZUGU iPadPro 12.9inch Case to be different. The Synthetic (Cruelty-Free) leather & handsome microfiber lining means You’ll look good & will be protected from scuffs & scratches... And with 10 magnetically secure angles, you’ll always find a comfortable viewing position.

YOU’LL LOVE YOUR NEW ZUGU CASE... WE GUARANTEE IT! We’re so confident you’ll absolutely LOVE your new Alpha Case that we fully stand behind it with an INDUSTRY LEADING, 2 YEAR ‘NO QUESTIONS ASKED’ WARRANTY by ZUGU CASE. Designed specifically for the 2022 / 2021 12.9 inch Gen. 6 / Gen. 5iPad Pro (Back of iPad model #’s A2378, A2379, A2461, A2462, A2436, A2437, A2764, A2766) * The Free iPad AppleCare + repair costs service is currently applicable only in the US.
